title: European Communities (Pesticide Residues) (Amendment) Regulations 2026.
text:
S.I. No. 7/2026 - European Communities (Pesticide Residues) (Amendment) Regulations 2026

th January,

I, MARTIN HEYDON, Minister for Agriculture, Food and the Marine, in exercise of the powers conferred on me by section 3 of the European Communities Act 1972 (No. 27 of 1972), for the purpose of giving full effect to Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/163 of 18 January 2023
, Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/466 of 3 March 2023
, Commission Regulation (EU) 2024/2609 of 7 October 2024
, Commission Regulation (EU) 2024/2612 of 7 October 2024

1. These Regulations may be cited as the European Communities (Pesticide Residues) (Amendment) Regulations 2026.
2. The European Communities (Pesticide Residues) Regulations 2008 (S.I. No. 565 of 2008) are amended in Regulation 2(1) by the substitution for the definition of “Pesticide MRL Regulation”, (inserted by the European Communities (Pesticide Residues) (Amendment) Regulations 2024 (S.I. No.678 of 2024)), of–
“‘Pesticide MRL Regulation’ means Regulation (EC) No 396/2005 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 23 February 2005

GIVEN under my Official Seal,
14 January, 2026.
MARTIN HEYDON,
Minister for Agriculture, Food and the Marine.
EXPLANATORY NOTE
This note is not part of the Instrument and does not purport to be a legal interpretation.
These Regulations amend the maximum residue levels (MRL) for certain plant protection products permissible in food and feed as provided for under Regulation (EC) No 396/2005.
